Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Rapid provider or facility growth
WA_Data_Source: DSHS AFH license dataset (formation/license dates); ALTSA caseload forecast
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Count new AFH licenses per year by county; compare to bed/caseload growth
Status_Notes: Testable over time with license-date field; this snapshot shows current roster only

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Spending growth disconnected from beneficiary growth
WA_Data_Source: OFM/DSHS LTC budget; HCA spending-growth reports; Caseload Forecast Council
WA_Signal_or_Metric: LTC total funds grew from $3.8B (2013-15, WRC 2021) to $10.44B (2023-25, OFM enacted) to $13.07B proposed (2025-27, +25.2%; DSHS-reported enacted ~$12.9B); AFH bargaining +$266M
Status_Notes: Documented at program level; per-AFH payment data requires HCA records request

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Multi-entity or multi-facility operator concentration
WA_Data_Source: HCA Medicaid payment data by provider (not public); proxy: operator clusters
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Provider-payment concentration not public; phone clusters show operator concentration
Status_Notes: True billing concentration = records request; operator concentration computed (72 clusters)

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Geographic concentration or out-of-state operator
WA_Data_Source: SOS registered-agent/governor addresses (CCFS); AFH owner address
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Out-of-state governor/agent addresses via CCFS sampling
Status_Notes: CCFS API gated; sample via UI; not bulk-computable -> records/manual

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Incomplete administrative or enrollment data
WA_Signal_or_Metric: % of applications with incomplete ownership/background data
Status_Notes: Internal DSHS metric; records request

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Excluded party involvement or linkage gap
Description_of_Alleged_Pattern: Excluded individuals operating via new LLCs.
WA_Data_Source: HCA + DSHS exclusion lists; LEIE; AFH licensee names
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Cross-match exclusion names vs AFH operators
Status_Notes: Public lists available; join blocked b/c facility names != licensee legal names (0 verified matches)

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Concealed or opaque ownership / related-party control
WA_Data_Source: County assessor parcel ownership vs AFH address; AFH is residence
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Match AFH property owner (assessor) to licensee
Status_Notes: Assessor data public per county; cross-match is manual/records-intensive

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Shared address, phone, registered agent, or network
WA_Data_Source: DSHS dataset shared phone/address/contact; SOS common governors
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Shared-phone clusters: 72 multi-license clusters (up to 4 homes/phone)
Status_Notes: Computed from public DSHS data; full ownership disclosure (42 CFR 455.104) = records request

Domain: Category 1: Program, Enrollment, and Network Anomalies
Red_Flag: Phantom, mailbox, virtual, or questionable address
Description_of_Alleged_Pattern: Use of mail drops as headquarters.
WA_Signal_or_Metric: AFHs are residences (low risk for AFH); relevant for HCBS agencies (HSS-analogue)
Status_Notes: AFH model differs from MN HSS; flag mainly applies to in-home/agency HCBS

Domain: Category 2: Billing and Claims Anomalies Requiring Internal Data
Red_Flag: Impossible hours or overlapping services
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Overlapping units per provider/day
Status_Notes: Claims-level; records request / HCA program integrity

Domain: Category 2: Billing and Claims Anomalies Requiring Internal Data
Red_Flag: Maximum-unit or implausible service-volume billing
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Providers billing max daily units for all clients
Status_Notes: Claims-level; records request

Domain: Category 2: Billing and Claims Anomalies Requiring Internal Data
Red_Flag: Out-of-state or impossible-location billing
Description_of_Alleged_Pattern: Billing while provider is out of the country.
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Billing while provider/recipient out of state
Status_Notes: Claims+investigation; surfaces only via enforcement cases

Domain: Category 2: Billing and Claims Anomalies Requiring Internal Data
Red_Flag: Billing after death, absence, discharge, or ineligibility
Description_of_Alleged_Pattern: Billing for hospitalized or deceased clients.
WA_Data_Source: HCA claims vs death records (not public)
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Claims after recipient DOD
Status_Notes: Claims-level; SAO concurrent-enrollment audit method analogous

Domain: Category 2: Billing and Claims Anomalies Requiring Internal Data
Red_Flag: Cloned, missing, copied, or fabricated documentation
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Read AFH investigation PDFs for documentation findings
Status_Notes: Public per facility (586 facilities have investigations) but requires PDF reading

Domain: Category 2: Billing and Claims Anomalies Requiring Internal Data
Red_Flag: Stolen credentials or unauthorized professional IDs
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Surfaces in enforcement cases (e.g., King Co imposter-nurse conviction 2026)
Status_Notes: Public via court/AGO; not a dataset field

Domain: Category 3: Oversight and Systemic Failures
Red_Flag: Frontline referrals not acted upon or poorly triaged
Description_of_Alleged_Pattern: Failure to act on credible referrals.
WA_Signal_or_Metric: SAO 2021: Division does not determine credibility of MCO/DSHS fraud allegations
Status_Notes: Documented qualitatively in SAO audits; case-timeline detail = records request

Domain: Category 3: Oversight and Systemic Failures
Red_Flag: Payment holds, sanctions, exclusions, terminations, or enforcement history
WA_Data_Source: DSHS RCS reports portal (enforcement letters); WA HCA termination/exclusion list; federal LEIE
WA_Signal_or_Metric: DSHS RCS enforcement/sanction record (testable); HCA/LEIE exclusion cross-check (blocked by name linkage)
Status_Notes: Sanction/enforcement component fully public (165 facilities w/ enforcement, 18 stop-placements). Exclusion cross-check returned 0 verified matches due to DBA-vs-legal-name gap (Section 6.6) -> partially testable overall.

Domain: Category 3: Oversight and Systemic Failures
Red_Flag: Reactive oversight and insufficient capacity
WA_Signal_or_Metric: SAO 2021: no statewide fraud plan; no risk-based audit targeting; reactive posture
Status_Notes: Strongly documented in SAO audits

Domain: Category 3: Oversight and Systemic Failures
Red_Flag: Program design vulnerability
WA_Signal_or_Metric: Assess low-barrier entry / records requirements for AFH & HCBS lines
Status_Notes: Documented via rule analysis; AFH has licensing barrier (unlike MN HSS)

Domain: Category 3: Oversight and Systemic Failures
Red_Flag: Unresolved audit findings or weak corrective action
WA_Signal_or_Metric: SAO Medicaid PI is a recurring audit series (2021->2023->2025); track recommendation closure
Status_Notes: Testable via SAO follow-up reports
